title: Move time tracking logs to another item
excerpt: We are starting to use the time tracking function for timesheets and our first users have got into a pickle a few times logging time to the wrong items. At the moment they have to delete the whole log and manually add on…

posts.author: StephRH (Steph King)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are starting to use the time tracking function for timesheets and our first users have got into a pickle a few times logging time to the wrong items. At the moment they have to delete the whole log and manually add one elsewhere.

We would love to have a copy and paste or a drag for individual time logs so that people can reassign a time log quickly and easily.
